headline: Accenture to roll out Copilot to all 743,000 employees in boost for Microsoft
summary: Microsoft is rolling out its Copilot 365 AI assistant to all of Accenture's roughly 743,000 employees, in the biggest enterprise deal for ‌the chatbot as the software giant seeks to convert more of its vast customer ‌base into paying users.  It is a major boost for Microsoft as just a little more than 3% of its over 450 million 365 enterprise users pay for the $30-a-month offering.  Slow Copilot adoption and uneven cloud growth have deepened investor worries over returns from Microsoft's hefty AI outlay.

headline: Assessing Accenture (NYSE:ACN) Valuation As New AI Alliances With Google Cloud Microsoft And Piraeus Bank Take Shape
summary: AI alliances put Accenture (ACN) in focus after sector jitters Accenture (ACN) has become a focal point for investors after fresh concerns about consulting weighed on the sector, just as the company stepped up its push into applied AI through a series of new partnerships. See our latest analysis for Accenture. At a share price of US$178.36, Accenture has seen pressure in recent months, with a 90 day share price return of 35.33% decline and a 1 year total shareholder return of 37.59% decline...
